---
title: "Morphosyntax (Morphology Part 2, Syntax Part 2)"
author: "Vaishnav Sudarshan"
date: "2026-3-10"
categories:  [Cool Linguistics Stuff]
abstract: The next step in the linguistics circle - how words work together to form complete sentences.
---

# Word Order

# Nouns

## Cases

# Alignment

# Verbs

# Inflection/Derivation

## Transitive/Intransitive

# Movement

# How different languages classify parts of speech (substitution test)
